concerns.text: FR-005 mandates Bonferroni correction across all queries and metrics. The upstream plan review flagged this as likely rendering the study underpowered (high Type II error) given the expected small effect sizes. The spec must either justify this strict correction, switch to a less conservative method (e.g., Benjamini-Hochberg), or explicitly acknowledge the risk of false negatives to align with the research goal of detecting *any* significant associations.
